summary: Frontend testing for App Directory page and Login page theme changes. Both features working correctly.

issues: Body background color is rgb(0,0,0) but container has white background - this is expected React Native web behavior
design_issues.severity: INFO - not a bug, just implementation detail

appdirectory_page_load.details: Page loads correctly with proper title 'App Directory i'M On Social'

appdirectory_hero_section.details: Hero h1 displays 'App Directory' with correct styling

appdirectory_search_functionality.details: Search filters cards correctly - searching 'Digital Card' reduced visible cards to 1

appdirectory_category_collapse_expand.details: Category headers toggle open/closed state when clicked

appdirectory_public_customer_pages_links.details: All 8 links in Public Customer Pages section point to app.imonsocial.com (e.g., https://app.imonsocial.com/imos/digital-card)

appdirectory_marketing_section_links.details: Marketing section has relative paths (/, /appdirectory) and app.imonsocial.com links as expected

appdirectory_footer.details: Footer displays i'M On Social branding with copyright '© 2026 i'M On Social. All rights reserved.'

appdirectory_navigation.details: Navigation bar present with logo (alt: i'M On Social), Products/Solutions/Resources dropdowns, Pricing link, Sign In and Get a Demo buttons

login_page_light_theme.details: Login page displays with white background (light theme) - form container is white with good contrast

login_page_form_elements.details: Email input, Password input (with show/hide toggle), Remember me checkbox, Forgot Password link, Log In button, Sign Up button all present and functional

login_functionality.details: Login with forest@imosapp.com / Admin123! successful - redirected to /home

context_for_next_testing_agent: App Directory at /appdirectory/ is a static HTML page served from /frontend/public/appdirectory/index.html. It has its own inline JS for search and toggle functionality. Login page at /auth/login is an Expo/React Native web app with forced light theme (colors hardcoded in lines 40-48 of login.tsx). Both features fully functional. Note: Twilio SMS is MOCKED.

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: Mocked - not testing actual SMS sending
